summary:
OS Command Injection
LibreNMS allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands by using the `community` parameter to `html/pages/addhost.inc.php` during creation of a new device, and then making a `/ajax_output.php?id`=capture&format=text&type=snmpwalk&hostname=localhost` request that triggers `html/includes/output/capture.inc.php` command mishandling.
